title: [FIRRTL][RefType] Add RefType ports to external modules
body:
This commit adds `RefType` ports to external modules to generate XMR into them.
The `LowerXMR` pass will remove the `RefType` ports and generate the appropriate XMRs.
The `GrandCentral` `DataTaps` use an `internalPath` to specify data taps into an extern module. 
The `internalPath` is a string, that denotes the path to the signal that needs to be tapped inside the extern module.
This commit replaces the previous approach of using a `Verbatim` op to specify the path into the extern module. 
Not relying on the `Verbatim` and symbols helps express the XMR purely as a dataflow and removes reliance on symbol renaming and other expensive transformations.
